inputs.label: Distance
inputs.businessContext: The total distance of the trip in miles.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total distance of the trip in miles.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Gesamtstrecke der Fahrt in Meilen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance totale du trajet en miles.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia total del viaje en millas.

inputs.label: Duration
inputs.businessContext: The total duration of the trip in minutes.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total duration of the trip in minutes.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Gesamtdauer der Fahrt in Minuten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée totale du trajet en minutes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración total del viaje en minutos.

inputs.label: Base Fare
inputs.businessContext: The fixed pickup charge applied to every ride.

businessContext_i18n.en: The fixed pickup charge applied to every ride.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her yolculukta uygulanan sabit alma ücreti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die feste Abholgebühr, die auf jede Fahrt erhoben wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais de prise en charge fixes appliqués à chaque course.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cargo fijo de recogida aplicado a cada viaje.
businessContext_i18n.ar: رسوم الاستلام الثابتة المطبقة على كل رحلة.

inputs.label: Cost per Mile
inputs.businessContext: The rate charged per mile traveled.

businessContext_i18n.en: The rate charged per mile traveled.
businessContext_i18n.ar: السعر المفروض لكل ميل يتم قطعه.

inputs.label: Cost per Minute
inputs.businessContext: The rate charged per minute of trip time.

businessContext_i18n.en: The rate charged per minute of trip time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Seyahat süresinin dakikası başına ücretlendirilen oran.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tarifa cobrada por minuto de tiempo de viaje.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المعدل المفروض لكل دقيقة من وقت الرحلة.

inputs.label: Booking Fee
inputs.businessContext: A flat service fee added to every ride.

businessContext_i18n.en: A flat service fee added to every ride.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her yolculuğa eklenen sabit hizmet ücreti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Eine pauschale Servicegebühr, die auf jede Fahrt erhoben wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais de service fixes ajoutés à chaque course.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tarifa de servicio fija añadida a cada viaje.
businessContext_i18n.ar: رسوم خدمة ثابتة تضاف إلى كل رحلة.

inputs.label: Surge Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: A demand-based multiplier applied to the sum of base, distance, and time charges.

businessContext_i18n.en: A demand-based multiplier applied to the sum of base, distance, and time charges.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Taban, mesafe ve zaman ücretlerinin toplamına uygulanan talep bazlı çarpan.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ein nachfragebasierter Multiplikator, der auf die Summe aus Grund-, Distanz- und Zeitgebühren angewendet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur basé sur la demande appliqué à la somme des frais de base, de distance et de temps.
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador basado en la demanda aplicado a la suma de los cargos base, distancia y tiempo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مضاعف يعتمد على الطلب يُطبق على مجموع الرسوم الأساسية ورسوم المسافة والوقت.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
